ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_areas" (
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community area */,
  "community_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the community area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the community area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the community area */,
  "area_square_miles" REAL /* Area of the community area in square miles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area the demographic data belongs to */,
  "percent_housing_crowded" REAL /* Percentage of housing units that are crowded */,
  "percent_households_below_poverty" REAL /* Percentage of households below the poverty line */,
  "percent_aged_16_unemployed" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aged 16 and older who are unemployed */,
  "percent_aged_25_without_high_school_diploma" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aged 25 and older without a high school diploma */,
  "percent_aged_under_18_or_over_64" REAL /* Percentage of population that is under 18 or over 64 */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of different racial groups */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of different ethnic groups */,
  "household_size_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of household sizes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area the income data belongs to */,
  "per_capita_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income of the community area */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the community area */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON column to store the distribution of income levels */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardship_indexes" (
  "hardship_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardship index record */,
  "community_area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community area the hardship index belongs to */,
  "hardship_index" INTEGER /* Hardship index of the community area */,
  "health_index" INTEGER /* Index related to healthcare access and quality */,
  "safety_index" INTEGER /* Index related to crime rates and safety */,
  "education_index" INTEGER /* Index related to educational attainment and opportunities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardship_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardship_indexes_community_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_area_id") REFERENCES community_areas ("community_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, community leader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the data was imported from */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file imported */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file in bytes */,
  "import_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store additional details about the import process */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the change was made to */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* JSON column to store detailed information about the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)
